Cats and Dogs.title: Raining Cats and Dogs
Cats and Dogs.description: English Definition: Means it is raining heavily
Cats and Dogs.mandarinText: 倾盆大雨, 雨下得非常大，在句子利用：'Wow, it is raining cats and dogs out there, good thing we are taking shelter.'

Take a Hike.title: Go take a hike
Take a Hike.description: English Definition: Means they want you to go away or to stop bothering you
Take a Hike.mandarinText: 滚开！快点滚！跟别人说不要打扰你了，在句子利用：‘Go take a hike, you are annoying me, leave me alone.'

A dime a dozen.title: A dime a dozen
A dime a dozen.description: English Definition: Means it is very common
A dime a dozen.mandarinText: 多得要，没设么特比的，到处都有，在句子利用：‘Books like these are a dime a dozen, there are so many of them.'

Bite the bullet.title: Bite the bullet
Bite the bullet.description: English Definition: Means to get something over with
Bite the bullet.mandarinText: 咬紧牙关应付, 你不想做但你勇敢地面对，在句子利用： ‘I hate going to the dentist, but I'll just have to bite the bullet.’

High Key.title: High Key
High Key.description: English Definition: Means to be serious or extremely so
High Key.mandarinText: 认真或当真，说这句意思是你对什么非常感觉，也可以意思是很明显，在句子利用： ‘I’m high key stressed about this deadline.’

No cap.title: No Cap
No cap.description: English Definition: Means no lie or telling the truth
No cap.mandarinText: 不骗你的意思，我在说真的，在句子利用： ‘That was the best movie I’ve ever seen, no cap.’

Rose colored glasses.title: Rose Colored Glasses
Rose colored glasses.description: English Definition: Means to be see something in an idealistic or optimistic way, sometimes naively
Rose colored glasses.mandarinText: 只看到事物好的方面，过于乐观地看待问题, 在句子利用： ‘She saw the world from rose colored glasses, believing everything was perfect.’

By the skin of your teeth.title: By the Skin of Your Teeth
By the skin of your teeth.description: English Definition: Means just barely or very narrowly
By the skin of your teeth.mandarinText: 侥幸成功，勉强完成，在句子利用： ‘I passed the exam by the skin of my teeth after studying all night.’

ghosted.title: Ghosted
ghosted.description: English Definition: Means cutting off someone or leaving them out of nowhere with no explaination or warning
ghosted.mandarinText: 玩失踪，你被放鸽子，在句子利用： ‘I was ghosted by my friend out of nowhere, she stopped responding or talking to me.’

salty.title: Salty
salty.description: English Definition: Means to be upset, annoyed, or petty about something, usually a loss or something small
salty.mandarinText: 有一点生气的感觉，恼恨，对别人感觉酸了，在句子利用： ‘She is just salty that she lost the game.’

glow up.title: Glow Up
glow up.description: English Definition: Means a big positive transformation in either looks or life
glow up.mandarinText: 蜕变，焕发光彩, 突然变了不过是个好事，在句子利用： ‘She had a really big glow up since I last saw her, she looks a lot happier now.’

under the weather.title: Under the Weather
under the weather.description: English Definition: Means to not feel good or feeling sick
under the weather.mandarinText: 感觉要生病了;觉得不舒服，在句子利用： ‘She looks a bit under the weather, maybe she is coming down with a cold.’
